investigation_metadata.disclaimer: The legitimate Cockroach Janta Community movement is a satirical, zero-sponsor youth initiative. It does NOT ask for any donations, membership registration fees, or payments. Any site soliciting funds, credit card information, or UPI transactions is fraudulent.
